So we output those three lines in order: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-C331239A, blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers.

No extra headings, no explanations, no JSON, no markdown. Just plain text lines.

We must be careful about line endings. The user wants a three-line status record. Should we include newline at end? Typically yes. So output:

repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-C331239A

That's it.
